# ALZ corp hub firewall example

Reference deployment of the corp-runners module behind an ALZ hub Azure
Firewall, with subnets and DNS resolution supplied by the corp landing zone
vending. See `EGRESS.md` for the FQDN ruleset the hub firewall must allow.

```hcl
locals {
  azure_firewall_private_ip    = var.azure_firewall_private_ip
  connectivity_subscription_id = var.connectivity_subscription_id
  hub_vnet_id                  = var.hub_vnet_id
}

module "corp_runners" {
  source = "../.."

  container_app_subnet_id                       = var.container_app_subnet_id
  container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id = var.container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id
  location                                      = var.location
  postfix                                       = "corpaca"
  version_control_system_organization           = var.github_organization
  version_control_system_type                   = "github"
  container_registry_dns_zone_id                = var.container_registry_dns_zone_id
  resource_group_creation_enabled               = true
  resource_group_name                           = var.runner_resource_group_name
  tags                                          = var.tags
  version_control_system_authentication_method  = "pat"
  version_control_system_personal_access_token  = var.github_personal_access_token
  version_control_system_repository             = var.github_repository
}




```

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9.0)

- <a name="requirement_azurerm"></a> [azurerm](#requirement\_azurerm) (~> 4.20)

## Resources

No resources.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_azure_firewall_private_ip"></a> [azure\_firewall\_private\_ip](#input\_azure\_firewall\_private\_ip)

Description: Azure Firewall private IP used as the next hop for runner egress UDRs.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_connectivity_subscription_id"></a> [connectivity\_subscription\_id](#input\_connectivity\_subscription\_id)

Description: Platform connectivity subscription ID that hosts the hub virtual network and Azure Firewall.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_container_app_subnet_id"></a> [container\_app\_subnet\_id](#input\_container\_app\_subnet\_id)

Description: Existing delegated subnet for the internal Container App Environment.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id"></a> [container\_registry\_private\_endpoint\_subnet\_id](#input\_container\_registry\_private\_endpoint\_subnet\_id)

Description: Existing private endpoint subnet for ACR.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_github_personal_access_token"></a> [github\_personal\_access\_token](#input\_github\_personal\_access\_token)

Description: GitHub PAT or fine-grained token with self-hosted runner registration permissions.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_hub_vnet_id"></a> [hub\_vnet\_id](#input\_hub\_vnet\_id)

Description: Connectivity hub virtual network resource ID used by the consumer to wire AVNM and UDR dependencies.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_subscription_id"></a> [subscription\_id](#input\_subscription\_id)

Description: Corp runner landing zone subscription ID.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_container_registry_dns_zone_id"></a> [container\_registry\_dns\_zone\_id](#input\_container\_registry\_dns\_zone\_id)

Description: Optional existing privatelink.azurecr.io private DNS zone ID.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_github_organization"></a> [github\_organization](#input\_github\_organization)

Description: GitHub organization for runner registration.

Type: `string`

Default: `"alz-avm-tf-demo"`

### <a name="input_github_repository"></a> [github\_repository](#input\_github\_repository)

Description: GitHub repository for repository-scoped runners.

Type: `string`

Default: `"alz-aca-runners"`

### <a name="input_location"></a> [location](#input\_location)

Description: Azure region.

Type: `string`

Default: `"swedencentral"`

### <a name="input_runner_resource_group_name"></a> [runner\_resource\_group\_name](#input\_runner\_resource\_group\_name)

Description: Resource group for corp runner resources.

Type: `string`

Default: `"rg-corp-aca-runners-swedencentral-001"`

### <a name="input_tags"></a> [tags](#input\_tags)

Description: Tags applied to module resources.

Type: `map(string)`

Default:

```json
{
  "alz-layer": "landing-zone-runner",
  "managed-by": "terraform",
  "workload": "corp-aca-runners"
}
```

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_azure_firewall_private_ip"></a> [azure\_firewall\_private\_ip](#output\_azure\_firewall\_private\_ip)

Description: Firewall private IP consumed by the surrounding UDR configuration.

### <a name="output_connectivity_subscription_id"></a> [connectivity\_subscription\_id](#output\_connectivity\_subscription\_id)

Description: Connectivity subscription containing the hub and Azure Firewall.

### <a name="output_hub_vnet_id"></a> [hub\_vnet\_id](#output\_hub\_vnet\_id)

Description: Hub virtual network consumed by the surrounding AVNM and UDR configuration.

### <a name="output_runner_identity_principal_id"></a> [runner\_identity\_principal\_id](#output\_runner\_identity\_principal\_id)

Description: Managed identity principal ID for granting runner workload RBAC.
